name: @objectstack/console
description: Prebuilt Console SPA pinned to this @objectstack/framework release. Source of truth: @object-ui/console (https://github.com/objectstack-ai/objectui).

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/index.html';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('\n✗ @objectstack/console: '+p+' is missing — run scripts/build-console.sh before publishing.\n');process.exit(1)}"
